title: leptanthus reniformis
intro: Leptanthus reniformis, also known as the kidney leaf or kidneywort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Leptanthus reniformis include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Leptanthus reniformis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in tincture and salve form to utilize its medicinal properties.
